MINI MINUTES: Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff, Parkmerced Investors Properties is present.
Attorney, Daniel Stern, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Rosemary Rinauro, is present.
Attorney, Gregory Foerster, representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Koorosh Afshari, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 304B, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
This case settled, the trial date of AUG-30-2010 is vacated.
